name: Sumavision Technologies Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sumavision Technologies Co.,Ltd. provides video and broadband solutions to various markets worldwide. Its DTV head-end hardware products include enhanced multimedia router, a video processing platform that provides solution for encoding, decoding, multiplexing, modulating, demodulating, scrambling, descrambling, and statistical multiplexing of SD and HD MPEG video; high density edge QAM modulator for cable digital television broadcasting and VOD systems; D8120 integrated receiver decoder; E8310 and HEVC 4K/HD multi-channel encoders; multiplexer and scramblers; modulators; The company also offers encoding and transcoding products, such as real-time transcoding, offline transcoding, and media gateway systems; stream guard security systems; IPTV/OTT head-end products, including CDN and streaming systems and back-office systems; access network products, such as CMTS, OLTs, network management systems, cable modems, and ONU products; and IPTV/OTT terminals. Sumavision Technologies Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
